summary: The CI prettier job failed: yarn exited with code 1 while processing packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js, indicating a formatting failure.
root_cause: Prettier (invoked via yarn) exited with status 1 while handling packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js, causing the job to fail.

evidence.reason: Shows the failing CI job is the Prettier/formatting step.
Identifies the file referenced in the log output, likely the file that triggered the failure.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: Indicates the yarn command (which runs the formatting check) failed and returned a non-zero exit code, causing the job to fail.

evidence.quote: info Visit https://yarnpkg.com/en/docs/cli/run for documentation about this command.
evidence.reason: Shows the command was run via yarn, implying the formatting check was invoked through a yarn script.

suggested_fix: Run the project's prettier/format script locally (e.g., via yarn) and format the failing file, for example: yarn prettier --write packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js, then commit the formatted changes and re-run CI.
